generate_standard_function.task: Merge overlapping intervals in a list of tuples.
generate_standard_function.signature: def merge_intervals(intervals: list[tuple[int, int]]) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:
generate_standard_function.description:
Input: list of start/end integer tuples, unsorted.
Output: list of merged overlapping/adjacent intervals, sorted by start time.

generate_codebase_context.task: Implement a helper to check if a user is an administrator and active.
generate_codebase_context.existing_code:
from pydantic import BaseModel

class User(BaseModel):
    id: str
    role: str
    is_active: bool
generate_codebase_context.description: Checks if the provided User object has role == 'admin' and is_active is True.
test_cases:
admin = User(id='1', role='admin', is_active=True)
assert is_active_admin(admin) == True

user = User(id='2', role='user', is_active=True)
assert is_active_admin(user) == False
constraints: Do not import external packages outside of pydantic

generate_bugfix_refactor.problem: Infinite loop occurs when the target is not in the array or when mid does not increment correctly (e.g. low = mid instead of low = mid + 1).
generate_bugfix_refactor.expected_behavior: Should return the index of the target in O(log n) time, or -1 if target is not found, without entering an infinite loop.
generate_bugfix_refactor.task: Fix the boundary indices updates inside the while loop.

generate_multi_function_module.module_purpose: Provides calculations for Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) and Least Common Multiple (LCM).

functions.name: gcd
functions.signature: def gcd(a: int, b: int) -> int:
functions.description: Calculates the greatest common divisor of two integers using the Euclidean algorithm.
constraints: Must handle zero and negative inputs (take absolute values)

functions.name: lcm
functions.signature: def lcm(a: int, b: int) -> int:
functions.description: Calculates the least common multiple of two integers using the relation: lcm(a, b) = abs(a*b) / gcd(a, b).
constraints: Must handle zero input (lcm with 0 is 0)
